CustomField.inlineHelpText: Please select up to 2 of the following reasons
CustomField.label: Downsell Reasons

value.fullName: Relationship - No relationship with decision-making authority
value.label: Relationship - No relationship with decision-making authority

value.fullName: Relationship - Working with few/wrong teams for company’s use case(s)
value.label: Relationship - Working with few/wrong teams for company’s use case(s)

value.fullName: Solution Gap - Downgraded plan / removed feature(s)
value.label: Solution Gap - Downgraded plan / removed feature(s)

value.fullName: Solution Gap - Product or features unfit for the use case
value.label: Solution Gap - Product or features unfit for the use case

value.fullName: Solution Gap - Pricing and packaging unfit for client’s needs
value.label: Solution Gap - Pricing and packaging unfit for client’s needs

value.fullName: Pricing Gap - Unwilling to pay previous price as pricing did not justify ROI/value
value.label: Pricing Gap - Unwilling to pay previous price as pricing did not justify ROI/value

value.fullName: Pricing Gap - Price match vs competitor
value.label: Pricing Gap - Price match vs competitor

value.fullName: Client Gap - Insufficient Budget (unable to pay previous price due to internal budget reasons)
value.label: Client Gap - Insufficient Budget (unable to pay previous price due to internal budget reasons)

value.fullName: Client Gap - Getting data from Agency/Third Party
value.label: Client Gap - Getting data from Agency/Third Party
